en: Thus says the LORD to me, "Go and buy a linen loincloth and put it around your waist, and do not dip it in water."
zh: 耶和華這樣對我說：“你去為自己買一根麻布腰帶，束在腰上，但不要把它放在水中。”

en: So I bought a loincloth according to the word of the LORD, and put it around my waist.
zh: 我就照著耶和華的話，買了一根腰帶，束在腰上。

en: And the word of the LORD came to me a second time,
zh: 耶和華的話第二次臨到我，說：

en: "Take the loincloth that you have bought, which is around your waist, and arise, go to the Euphrates and hide it there in a cleft of the rock."
zh: “拿你買來束在腰上的腰帶，起來，往幼發拉底河去，把腰帶藏在那裡的巖石縫中。”

en: So I went and hid it by the Euphrates, as the LORD commanded me.
zh: 我就照著耶和華所吩咐我的，去把腰帶藏在幼發拉底河那裡。

en: And after many days the LORD said to me, "Arise, go to the Euphrates, and take from there the loincloth that I commanded you to hide there."
zh: 過了多日，耶和華對我說：“起來，往幼發拉底河去，把我吩咐你藏在那裡的腰帶取出來。”

en: Then I went to the Euphrates, and dug, and I took the loincloth from the place where I had hidden it. And behold, the loincloth was spoiled; it was good for nothing.
zh: 於是我往幼發拉底河去，在那裡挖掘，把腰帶從我埋藏的地方取出來；看哪！腰帶已經腐爛了，完全沒用了。

en: Then the word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 那時，耶和華的話臨到我，說：

en: "Thus says the LORD: Even so will I spoil the pride of Judah and the great pride of Jerusalem.
zh: “耶和華這樣說：‘我必照樣敗壞猶大的尊榮和耶路撒冷極大的尊榮。

en: This evil people, who refuse to hear my words, who stubbornly follow their own heart and have gone after other gods to serve them and worship them, shall be like this loincloth, which is good for nothing.
zh: 這邪惡的人民，不肯聽從我的話，他們隨著自己頑梗的心行事，隨從別的神，事奉敬拜他們；所以他們必像這根腰帶，毫無用處。

en: For as the loincloth clings to the waist of a man, so I made the whole house of Israel and the whole house of Judah cling to me, declares the LORD, that they might be for me a people, a name, a praise, and a glory, but they would not listen.
zh: 因為腰帶怎樣緊貼著人的腰，我也曾怎樣使以色列全家和猶大全家緊貼著我，好使他們作我的子民，叫我得名聲，得讚美，得榮耀；可是他們卻不聽從。’”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "You shall speak to them this word: 'Thus says the LORD, the God of Israel, "Every jar shall be filled with wine."' And they will say to you, 'Do we not indeed know that every jar will be filled with wine?'
zh: “你要對他們說這話：‘耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：每一個酒瓶都要盛滿酒。’如果他們對你說：‘難道我們不清楚知道每一個酒瓶都要盛滿酒嗎？’

en: Then you shall say to them, 'Thus says the LORD: Behold, I will fill with drunkenness all the inhabitants of this land: the kings who sit on David's throne, the priests, the prophets, and all the inhabitants of Jerusalem.
zh: 你就要對他們說：‘耶和華這樣說：看哪！我要使這地所有的居民，就是那些坐大衛王位的君王，以及祭司、先知和耶路撒冷所有的居民，都完全醉倒。

en: And I will dash them one against another, fathers and sons together, declares the LORD. I will not pity or spare or have compassion, that I should not destroy them.'"
zh: 我要使他們彼此碰撞，連父子也要互相碰撞；我必不愛惜、不可憐，也不憐憫他們，我必把他們滅絕。’”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Hear and give ear; be not proud, for the LORD has spoken.
zh: 你們要聽，要留心聽，不要驕傲； 因為是耶和華說的。

en: Give glory to the LORD your God before he brings darkness, before your feet stumble on the twilight mountains, and while you look for light he turns it into gloom and makes it deep darkness.
zh: 耶和華你們的 神還沒有使黑暗臨到以前， 你們的腳還沒有在昏暗的山上絆倒之前， 你們要把榮耀歸給他。 你們期待光明， 他卻把光明變為死蔭， 使光明變成黝黑。

en: But if you will not listen, my soul will weep in secret for your pride; my eyes will weep bitterly and run down with tears, because the LORD's flock has been taken captive.
zh: 如果你們不聽從， 我必因你們的驕傲暗暗哭泣； 我的眼必痛哭流淚， 因為耶和華的羊群被擄去了。

en: Say to the king and the queen mother: "Take a lowly seat, for your beautiful crown has come down from your head."
zh: 你要對君王和太后說： “你們應從寶座下來， 因為華麗的冠冕 已經從你們的頭上脫下來了。”

en: The cities of the Negeb are shut up, with none to open them; all Judah is taken into exile, wholly taken into exile.
zh: 南地的城市已被圍困， 沒有人能解圍； 整個猶大都被擄走， 全被擄去了。

en: "Lift up your eyes and see those who come from the north. Where is the flock that was given you, your beautiful flock?
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！你要舉目觀看 那些從北方來的人。 從前交給你的羊群， 就是你引以為榮的群羊，現今在哪裡呢？

en: What will you say when they set as head over you those whom you yourself have taught to be friends to you? Will not pangs take hold of you like those of a woman in labor?
zh: 耶和華立你自己結交 的盟友 為首領管轄你， 那時，你還有甚麼話說呢？ 痛苦豈不把你抓住， 好像婦女生產時的痛苦一樣嗎？

en: And if you say in your heart, 'Why have these things come upon me?' it is for the greatness of your iniquity that your skirts are lifted up and you suffer violence.
zh: 如果你心裡問： “這些事為甚麼發生在我身上呢？” 這是由於你極大的罪孽； 你的袍子被掀起， 你的下體 暴露出來。

en: Can the Ethiopian change his skin or the leopard his spots? Then also you can do good who are accustomed to do evil.
zh: 古實人怎能改變他的膚色？ 花豹怎能改變牠的斑點？ 你們這些慣作壞事的人， 又怎能行善呢？

en: I will scatter you like chaff driven by the wind from the desert.
zh: “因此，我要使你們 四散， 像被曠野的風吹走的碎稭一樣。

en: This is your lot, the portion I have measured out to you, declares the LORD, because you have forgotten me and trusted in lies.
zh: 這是你應得的，是我量給你的分。” 這是耶和華的宣告。 “因為你忘記了我， 去倚靠虛假的偶像；

en: I myself will lift up your skirts over your face, and your shame will be seen.
zh: 所以，我必把你的袍子掀到你的臉上， 使人看見你的醜態。

en: I have seen your abominations, your adulteries and neighings, your lewd whorings, on the hills in the field. Woe to you, O Jerusalem! How long will it be before you are made clean?"
zh: 你的姦淫，你淫蕩的叫聲， 你邪淫的惡行， 在山上，在田野間， 你那些可憎的事我都看見了。 耶路撒冷啊，你有禍了！ 你這樣不潔淨要到幾時呢？”
